description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, host discusses the journey of Siong, a Solana engineer from Mercurial Meteora and Jupiter. They explore Siong's background, education, and experiences in the tech industry, including his time at Y Combinator and the launch of Jupiter.
topic_summary: Siong shares insights on his developer journey, education in computer science, and experiences in startups, including his involvement with Y Combinator and the launch of Jupiter [t=39:42].
